description: Edge case Content-Usage header parsing fixtures (RFC 9651 value type handling)

fixtures.name: bare-key-boolean
fixtures.description: Bare key is SF Boolean true, not Token y; produces no entry

fixtures.name: string-value-not-token
fixtures.description: String value (quoted) is not Token; produces no entry

fixtures.name: boolean-value-not-token
fixtures.description: Boolean ?0/?1 is not Token y/n; produces no entry

fixtures.name: unknown-token-value
fixtures.description: Unknown Token value (not y or n); produces no entry

fixtures.name: unknown-keys-as-extensions
fixtures.description: Unknown dictionary keys are stored as extensions, not dropped

fixtures.name: duplicate-key-last-wins
fixtures.description: Per SF rules, last value wins for duplicate keys

fixtures.name: whitespace-handling
fixtures.description: Whitespace around keys and values is trimmed

fixtures.name: oversized-header-rejected
fixtures.description: Headers exceeding MAX_HEADER_SIZE (8KB) produce empty result
